seoTitle: How to Connect Typeform to Mailchimp
metaDescription: Learn how to sync Typeform responses to your Mailchimp audience automatically to grow your email list and automate marketing.
intro: Growing an email list manually from form responses is tedious and easy to fall behind on. This guide covers how to connect Typeform to Mailchimp so new respondents are automatically added to your audience, keeping your list current without manual work.

steps.heading: Open Typeform Integrations
steps.body: Go to the integrations section of your Typeform account to find the Mailchimp connection option.

steps.heading: Connect your Mailchimp account
steps.body: Authenticate your Mailchimp account within Typeform so the two platforms can communicate.

steps.heading: Map audience fields and configure sync
steps.body: Match your Typeform questions to the corresponding fields in your Mailchimp audience, then enable automatic syncing for new submissions.

faq.question: Will every form response be added to my Mailchimp audience?
faq.answer: Once configured, new submissions sync automatically to your chosen Mailchimp audience based on your field mapping.

faq.question: Can I use this for newsletter signups?
faq.answer: Yes, this integration is commonly used for newsletter signups, lead nurturing, and general email list growth.

faq.question: Do I need to authenticate my Mailchimp account each time?
faq.answer: No, you authenticate once during setup, and the connection stays active for ongoing syncing unless you disconnect it.

faq.question: Can I segment new contacts based on Typeform answers?
faq.answer: Depending on your field mapping, you can pass answer data into Mailchimp that supports segmentation and targeted marketing automation.
